Name: SP_EFFECT_PARAM_ST
Description:
Defines various effects that can be applied to the player and to enemies.
Can define passive, activated, single-use and repeated or continuous application effects with indefinite duration.
Successful application may depend on spCategory or invocationConditions.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: Icon ID (When -1, no icon is required)

Fields.Name: Trigger at HP Below %
Fields.Description: Set what percentage of maxHP the remaining HP will be activated

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: Change duration / -1 for permanent / 0 for one moment only

Fields.Name: Trigger Interval
Fields.Description: Set how many seconds it occurs

Fields.Name: Max HP %
Fields.Description: Correct the maximum HP

Fields.Name: Max FP %
Fields.Description: Correct the maximum MP

Fields.Name: Max Stamina %
Fields.Description: Correct the maximum SP

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Slash
Fields.Description: Slash damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Strike
Fields.Description: Batter damage ratio: The calculated damage is corrected by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Thrust
Fields.Description: Puncture damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Standard
Fields.Description: Non-attribute damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Magic
Fields.Description: Magic damage multiplier: The calculated damage is corrected by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Fire
Fields.Description: Flame damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Electric shock damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Physical
Fields.Description: Physical damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Magic
Fields.Description: Magic damage multiplier: The calculated damage is corrected by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Fire
Fields.Description: Flame damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Electric shock damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Power %: Physical
Fields.Description: Multiply the physical attack power by the set value

Fields.Name: Power %: Magic
Fields.Description: Multiply the magic attack power by the set value

Fields.Name: Power %: Fire
Fields.Description: Multiply the fire attack power by the set value

Fields.Name: Power %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Multiply the electric shock attack power by the set value

Fields.Name: Damage +: Physical
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for physical attack power

Fields.Name: Damage +: Magic
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the magic attack power

Fields.Name: Damage +: Fire
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the flame attack power

Fields.Name: Damage +: Lighting
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the electric shock attack power

Fields.Name: Defence %: Physical
Fields.Description: Multiply the set value for physical defense

Fields.Name: Defence %: Magic
Fields.Description: Multiply the value set for magic defense

Fields.Name: Defence %: Fire
Fields.Description: Multiply the fire defense by the set value

Fields.Name: Defence %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Multiply the value set for the electric shock defense

Fields.Name: Defence +: Physical
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for physical defense

Fields.Name: Defence +: Magic
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for magic defense

Fields.Name: Defence +: Fire
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the fire defense

Fields.Name: Defence +: Lightning
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the electric shock defense

Fields.Name: No Guard Damage %
Fields.Description: Replace the damage ratio at the time of the gap with the set value (set on the damage side)

Fields.Name: Vital Spot Change %
Fields.Description: Replaces the damage calculation of the sweet spot with the specified value (key point damage correction) -Invalid at 1.0

Fields.Name: Normal Hit Change %
Fields.Description: Replaces normal hit damage calculation with the specified number -Invalid at 1.0

Fields.Name: Max HP Change Rate %
Fields.Description: Increases or decreases maximum HP by the set multiplier

Fields.Name: Behavior ID
Fields.Description:
Specified -1 when dealing damage using action ID from special effects
NPC Behavior - Requires State Info 142
Player Behavior - Requires State Info 275
Bullet Behavior - Requires State Info 33

Fields.Name: Current HP %
Fields.Description: Set what percentage of the maximum HP to subtract (or add) with one activation

Fields.Name: Current HP +
Fields.Description: Set how many points to subtract (or add) with one activation

Fields.Name: Current FP %
Fields.Description: Set what percentage of the maximum MP to subtract (or add) with one activation

Fields.Name: Current FP +
Fields.Description: Set how many points to subtract (or add) with one activation

Fields.Name: FP Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: Change the recovery speed. Add or subtract to the standard recovery speed and initial recovery speed of the recovery formula.

Fields.Name: Current Stamina %
Fields.Description: Set what percentage of the maximum stamina to subtract (or add) with one activation

Fields.Name: Current Stamina +
Fields.Description: Set how many points to subtract (or add) with one activation

Fields.Name: Stamina Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: Change the recovery speed. Add or subtract to the standard recovery speed and initial recovery speed of the recovery formula.

Fields.Name: Magic Effect Time Change
Fields.Description: Add / subtract the time set for the effect duration only for magic that has the effect duration set to 0.1 seconds or more.

Fields.Name: Current Durability +
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the numerical value to the internal wear degree

Fields.Name: Max Durability
Fields.Description: Add the set value to the maximum value of the internal wear degree of durability.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Stamina
Fields.Description: Multiply the stamina attack power by a factor (1.0 1 times 0.5 half)

Fields.Name: Aux Inflict +: Poison
Fields.Description:
A value to be added to the target's [poison resistance value] when it hits
Requires State Info 2

Fields.Name: Aux Inflict +: Toxic
Fields.Description:
Numerical value to be added to the target [Plague resistance value] when hit
Requires State Info 5

Fields.Name: Aux Inflict +: Bleed
Fields.Description:
A value to be added to the target's [bleeding resistance value] when it hits
Requires State Info 6

Fields.Name: Aux Inflict +: Curse
Fields.Description:
A number to be added to the target [curse resistance value] when hit
Requires State Info 116

Fields.Name: Fall Damage %
Fields.Description: Multiply the damage calculation when falling

Fields.Name: Soul Gain %
Fields.Description:
The amount of soul acquired when defeating an enemy is added by the specified multiple.
Requires State Info 76

Fields.Name: Max Equip Load %
Fields.Description: Multiply the maximum equipment weight by the set magnification

Fields.Name: Item Weight %
Fields.Description: Multiply the maximum weight you have by the set magnification

Fields.Name: Soul Gain +
Fields.Description: Add the set value to the possessed soul

Fields.Name: Anim ID Offset
Fields.Description: Anime ID offset (invalid-1)

Fields.Name: Soul Possession Amount %
Fields.Description: For enemy lap effect. It is applied when the soul goes out from the set character.

Fields.Name: Target Priority
Fields.Description: Chance for an enemy to switch aggro targets to/away the effect's owner. Values range from -1 to 1. +1 = 100% chance to target owner instead of current target, -1 = 100% chance to target somebody else instead of current target (effect owner).

Fields.Name: Enemy Vision Adjustment
Fields.Description: Correct the ease of finding by a magnification

Fields.Name: Enemy Listen Adjustment
Fields.Description: Correct the loudness of the AI sound emitted by the magnification

Fields.Name: Gravity %
Fields.Description: Gravity rate

Fields.Name: Aux Resist %: Poison
Fields.Description: Multiply the poison resistance value by the set multiplier

Fields.Name: Aux Resist %: Toxic
Fields.Description: Multiply the plague resistance value by the set magnification

Fields.Name: Aux Resist %: Bleed
Fields.Description: Multiply the bleeding resistance value by the set magnification

Fields.Name: Aux Resist %: Curse
Fields.Description: Multiply the spell resistance value by the set multiplier

Fields.Name: Soul Steal %
Fields.Description: Defense against HP robbed by NPCs in Soul Steel

Fields.Name: HP Recovery Effectiveness %
Fields.Description: It doesn't work when HP decreases.

Fields.Name: Chain SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect ID added at the end of life (-1 is ignored)

Fields.Name: Cycle SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect ID that occurs in each activation cycle (-1 is ignored)

Fields.Name: Attack SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect ID that occurs when hitting an attack (-1 is ignored)

Fields.Name: Guard Defense - Weapon Repel Power %
Fields.Description: Repellent defense correction value when guarding

Fields.Name: Guard Stability %
Fields.Description: Stamina cut rate correction value when guarding

Fields.Name: Raycast Passed Time
Fields.Description: Passing the line of sight: Activation time [ms] (for evil eye)

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: Value to add to the super armor value

Fields.Name: Bow Distance %
Fields.Description: Correction value added to the flight distance correction of the weapon

Fields.Name: Effect Category
Fields.Description: Categories that determine behavior such as overwriting special effects

Fields.Name: Category Priority
Fields.Description: Priority within the same category (lower one has priority)

Fields.Name: Save Category
Fields.Description: Category to save special effects

Fields.Name: Magic Attunement Slot
Fields.Description: You can increase the specified number of magic registration slots

Fields.Name: Miracle Attunement Slot
Fields.Description: You can increase the specified number of trajectory registration frames.

Fields.Name: Humanity Damage
Fields.Description: Damage value given to human nature value

Fields.Name: Weapon Repel Defence +
Fields.Description: Set a value that overwrites the repelling defense

Fields.Name: Weapon Repel Absorption %
Fields.Description: Set a value that overwrites the damage attenuation rate at the time of repelling

Fields.Name: Damage Correction %: Bleed
Fields.Description: Point damage of state change type [bleeding], correction value used only when% damage

Fields.Name: Damage Level: No Impact
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv0

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Small Impact
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv1

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Medium Impact
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv2

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Large Impact
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv3

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Medium Blow
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv4

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Push
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv5

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Strike
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv6

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Small Blow
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv7

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Minimal
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv8

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Uppercut
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv9

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Blow Backward
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv10

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Breath
Fields.Description: Specify the type to replace the damage Lv11

Fields.Name: Attack Attribute
Fields.Description: Physical attributes to set for special effects

Fields.Name: SpEffect Attribute
Fields.Description: Special attributes to set for special effects

Fields.Name: State Info
Fields.Description: State change judgment flag

Fields.Name: Weapon Parameter Change
Fields.Description: Specify which weapon is effective. If there is no limit, all attacks and defenses including enemies are targeted

Fields.Name: Move Type
Fields.Description: Movement type. Change the movement speed.

Fields.Name: Throw Trigger
Fields.Description: Throwing conditions. Affects the throwing mask.

Fields.Name: Add Behavior Judge ID - Trigger
Fields.Description: Condition value to add a value to the action judgment ID (Def: -1)

Fields.Name: Behavior Judge ID - Add
Fields.Description: If the additional value of the action judgment ID is 0, the action will not be changed, but will not be taken.

Fields.Name: Target Self
Fields.Description: Only the target for which this judgment is checked is effective, the default is

Fields.Name: Target Friend
Fields.Description: Only the target for which this judgment is checked is effective, the default is

Fields.Name: Target Enemy
Fields.Description: Only the target for which this judgment is checked is effective, the default is

Fields.Name: Target Player
Fields.Description: Only the target for which this judgment is checked is effective, the default is

Fields.Name: Target AI
Fields.Description: Only the target for which this judgment is checked is effective, the default is

Fields.Name: Target Live
Fields.Description: Only the target for which this judgment is checked is effective, the default is

Fields.Name: Target Ghost
Fields.Description: Only the target for which this judgment is checked is effective, the default is

Fields.Name: Target White Ghost
Fields.Description: Only the target for which this judgment is checked is effective, the default is

Fields.Name: Target Black Ghost
Fields.Description: Only the target for which this judgment is checked is effective, the default is

Fields.Name: Target Attacker
Fields.Description: Apply special effects to attackers after damage (cannot enter defenders)

Fields.Name: Display Icon when Inactive
Fields.Description: The icon is displayed even in the state of waiting for activation.

Fields.Name: Use Intelligence Correction
Fields.Description: Do you want to correct the magic power?

Fields.Name: Use Faith Correction
Fields.Description: Do you correct your faith?

Fields.Name: Enable for Game Clear
Fields.Description: Whether it is for the game clear lap bonus.

Fields.Name: Affects Sorcery
Fields.Description: Set whether or not it is effective against magic

Fields.Name: Affects Incantation
Fields.Description: Set whether or not it is effective against miracles

Fields.Name: Clear Held Souls
Fields.Description: Possession soul becomes 0.

Fields.Name: Request: Friendly Phantom Summon
Fields.Description: If checked, issue an SOS sign request when activated

Fields.Name: Request: Hostile Phantom Summon
Fields.Description: If checked, issue a black SOS sign request when activated

Fields.Name: Request: Invasion
Fields.Description: If checked, issue an intrusion_A request when activated

Fields.Name: Request: Kick
Fields.Description: If checked, a kick request will be issued at the time of activation.

Fields.Name: Request: Return to Own World
Fields.Description: If checked, an exit request will be issued at the time of activation.

Fields.Name: Request: NPC Invasion
Fields.Description: If checked, an intrusion request to the NPC will be issued at the time of activation.

Fields.Name: Is No Dead
Fields.Description: Whether you can be corpse. With this check, you will not be dead

Fields.Name: Current HP independent Max HP
Fields.Description: Does HP now affect even if the maximum HP increases or decreases?

Fields.Name: Ignore Durability Loss
Fields.Description: [State change type] ignores [Durability] decrease due to [Corrosion]

Fields.Name: Ignore Vision Reductions
Fields.Description: Ignore visual search invalidity

Fields.Name: Ignore Listen Reductions
Fields.Description: Ignore auditory search invalidity

Fields.Name: Ignore Anti-Magic Effect
Fields.Description: You can use magic even in the anti-magic range

Fields.Name: Ignore Fake Targets
Fields.Description: Don't get caught in the fake target that occurred

Fields.Name: Ignore Fake Human Targets
Fields.Description: You will not be caught by the fake target of the human system that occurred

Fields.Name: Ignore Fake Animal Targets
Fields.Description: You will not be caught by the fake target of the beast system that occurred

Fields.Name: Ignore Gravity Change
Fields.Description: Gravity effect disabled

Fields.Name: Disable Poison
Fields.Description: If this effect is applied, it will not be poisoned.

Fields.Name: Disable Toxic
Fields.Description: If this effect is applied, you will not get plague

Fields.Name: Disable Bleed
Fields.Description: With this effect, you won't get bleeding

Fields.Name: Disable Curse
Fields.Description: With this effect, you won't be cursed

Fields.Name: Enable Charm
Fields.Description: If this effect is applied, you will be fascinated.

Fields.Name: Enable Lifetime
Fields.Description: Will the life be extended when the flag is set by TAE?

Fields.Name: Has Target
Fields.Description: Do you know the enemy? : [Activation condition] (for evil eye users)

Fields.Name: Cancel on Fire Damage
Fields.Description: Whether to replan at the time of activation

Fields.Name: Has Effect Duration Adjustment Applied
Fields.Description: Whether to be eligible for extension when the life extension effect is applied

Fields.Name: Request: Leave Arena
Fields.Description: If checked, a request to leave the arena will be issued at the time of activation.

Fields.Name: Disable Beasthood
Fields.Description: If this effect is applied, you will not be able to turn into a beast.

Fields.Name: Charge Attack Change
Fields.Description: Set whether or not it is effective against throwing attacks

Fields.Name: Full View in Darkness - Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of full view of darkness [m]. If you are within this distance, you will be able to see at normal distance even in the dark.

Fields.Name: Full View in Darkness - Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID (-1: Master) with full view of darkness. Create a full view area around this Damipoli

Fields.Name: AI Vision Correction
Fields.Description: Correct the ease of finding with a magnification. Requires State Info 267

Fields.Name: Listen Search Correction
Fields.Description: Correct the audibility of AI sound by magnification

Fields.Name: Aux Inflict +: Beasthood
Fields.Description: Number added to the target's [Beast Resistance Value] when hit.

Fields.Name: Aux Resist %: Beasthood
Fields.Description: Multiply the beasthood resistance value by the set magnification

Fields.Name: Team Type
Fields.Description: Overwrites the specified team type. Requires State Info 132

Fields.Name: Use Strength Correction
Fields.Description: Do you want to correct your strength?

Fields.Name: Use Dexterity Correction
Fields.Description: Do you want to correct your workmanship?

Fields.Name: Max Held
Fields.Description: Change in maximum number of items held

Fields.Name: Attack %: Slash
Fields.Description: Slash damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Strike
Fields.Description: Batter damage ratio: The calculated damage is corrected by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Thrust
Fields.Description: Puncture damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Standard
Fields.Description: Non-attribute damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Power %: Slash

Fields.Name: Power %: Strike
Fields.Description: Multiply the hit attack power by the set value

Fields.Name: Power %: Thrust
Fields.Description: Multiply the piercing attack power by the set value

Fields.Name: Power %: Standard
Fields.Description: Multiply the non-attribute attack power by the set value

Fields.Name: Damage +: Slash
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the slashing attack power

Fields.Name: Damage +: Strike
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the batter attack power

Fields.Name: Damage +: Thrust
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the piercing attack power

Fields.Name: Damage +: Standard
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for non-attribute attack power

Fields.Name: Weapon Stamina Consumption %
Fields.Description: Multiply by multiplying the consumption stamina value of the behavior parameter

Fields.Name: QS Bullet Addition
Fields.Description: Number of QS Bullets to add

Fields.Name: Activation Condition: Weapon Status
Fields.Description: Special effects will only be activated when the specified weapon is in use.

Fields.Name: Blood Bullet Addition
Fields.Description: Number of Blood Bullets to add

Fields.Description: Add or subtract the correction value of the weapon

Fields.Description: Add or subtract the correction value of the weapon

Fields.Description: Add or subtract the correction value of the weapon

Fields.Description: Increase or decrease the state resistance value

Fields.Description: Increase or decrease the state resistance value

Fields.Name: Trigger on HP Above %
Fields.Description: Activates only when you have HP above the specified value

Fields.Name: Item Discovery %
Fields.Description: The set value is added to [Item Drop Correction]. Requires State Info 66

Fields.Name: Transfusion Vial: HP %
Fields.Description: Transfusion blood HP damage amount

Fields.Name: Transfusion Vial: HP +
Fields.Description: Transfusion blood HP damage amount

Fields.Name: Activation Condition: State Info
Fields.Description: Special effects will be activated only when the specified status change type is selected.
